chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. 103 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 10.08.2023 None present for the Appellant. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh along with SIP Manzoor Ali of P.S Hyderi Market, Karachi. -x-x-x-x-x- Process issued against appellant returned served; however, no one is in attendance on his behalf. Perusal of record reveals that on very first date viz. 27.04.2023 though none was in attendance, yet order with regard to maintainability of appeal in hand was passed, hence, intimation notice to counsel for the appellant was issued. Right from 27.04.2023 to date, appellant as well as his counsel have remained absent without intimation. Same is the position of today. I have gone through the impugned judgment and found that the trial Court has discussed each and every aspect of the case by relying precedential law of the superior Courts, therefore, impugned judgment seemingly does not suffer from any illegality or infirmity which may warrant interference by this Court. Consequently and in view of above, instant appeal against acquittal is hereby dismissed along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
